description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: "Income Generation" shall be deemed to commence on July 1, 2025. From that date until the Prime’s TGE, seventy percent (70%) of any income generated by the Prime’s activities shall be credited to its capital account (net of any expenses paid by Sky as per [A.2.
.2.2.2.8.4 - Treatment of Expenses Paid By Sky Pre-TGE](f3672ca1-b305-4e16-86f0-3dc3267073bb)), subject to any penalties.

"Income Generation" shall be deemed to commence on July 1, 2025. From that date until the Prime’s TGE, seventy percent (70%) of any income generated by the Prime’s activities shall be credited to its capital account (net of any expenses paid by Sky as per [A.2.8.2.2.2.
.4 - Treatment of Expenses Paid By Sky Pre-TGE](f3672ca1-b305-4e16-86f0-3dc3267073bb)), subject to any penalties.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
